title: Linear Bootstrap MCP Server
description: Configuration for the Linear Bootstrap MCP server running as an Apify actor

LINEAR_API_KEY.title: Linear API Key
LINEAR_API_KEY.description: API key for accessing the Linear API

LLM_API_KEY.title: LLM API Key
LLM_API_KEY.description: API key for the LLM provider (OpenAI-compatible)

LLM_BASE_URL.title: LLM Base URL
LLM_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for the LLM API (OpenAI-compatible endpoint)
